scope: Terminology normalization across companion LENS V2 cinematic streams

checks.name: no_remaining_L7_terminology
checks.description: No occurrences of the standalone token `L7` remain in any of the four target directories (docs/psee/PI.LENS.V2.VISUAL-DIRECTION-DOCTRINE.01, docs/psee/PI.LENS.V2.CINEMATIC-REFERENCE-MAPPING.01, docs/pios/PI.LENS.V2.VISUAL-DIRECTION-DOCTRINE.01, docs/pios/PI.LENS.V2.CINEMATIC-REFERENCE-MAPPING.01).
checks.notes: Re-grep returned zero matches after normalization.

checks.name: no_remaining_51_x_terminology
checks.description: No occurrences of `51.x` remain in any of the four target directories.
checks.notes: Re-grep returned zero matches after normalization.

checks.name: no_remaining_demo_narrative_terminology
checks.description: No occurrences of `demo/narrative` or `demo / narrative` remain in any of the four target directories.
checks.method: grep -rn -E 'demo/narrative|demo / narrative' across all four directories
checks.notes: Re-grep returned zero matches after normalization.

checks.name: no_accidental_semantic_drift
checks.description: Each replacement preserved the meaning of the original passage. No clauses were rewritten beyond the token-level normalization and the explicit boundary-clarification addition mandated by the contract.
checks.notes: All 18 occurrences are substitutions inside existing sentences. The §14 boundary expansion in VISUAL_DIRECTION_DOCTRINE.md is an addition that strictly clarifies, never weakens, the existing boundary statement.

checks.name: no_governance_mutation
checks.description: No changes were made to docs/governance/, validators, validation logic, or any governance contract.
checks.method: git diff inspection — only docs/psee/PI.LENS.V2.* and docs/pios/PI.LENS.V2.* paths touched.
checks.notes: git diff confirms changes are scoped to the two companion streams and the new normalization stream's own pios pack.

checks.name: no_brain_authority_reinterpretation
checks.description: No Brain node was created, modified, or referenced as authority. Boundary clarification ENUMERATES Brain authority as out-of-scope; it does not assign authority.
checks.method: Inspection of doctrine §14 expansion against contract MANDATORY BOUNDARY CLARIFICATION list.
checks.notes: §14 now explicitly states the stream does NOT mutate Brain authority across all four brains, matching the contract's enumerated exclusions exactly.

checks.name: no_doctrine_weakening_or_playwright_regression
checks.description: All cinematic direction, executive cognition, anti-dashboard enforcement, motion / typography / color doctrine, reference deep-dives, comparison matrix, dashboard syndrome detection, and Playwright inspection framework content remains intact.
checks.method: Diff coverage check — only the 18 token-level edits and the §14 boundary expansion appear in the diff. No other content was modified, removed, or re-ordered.
checks.notes: Doctrine sections, rubric axes, mechanical signals, viewport list, route list, screenshot discipline, failure classification, and recovery guidance are byte-identical except for the catalogued occurrences.
